tool.name: Semantic Kernel
tool.description: Microsoft orchestration SDK evolving into the unified Microsoft Agent Framework direction.
tool.statusNote: Evolving into the Microsoft Agent Framework.
tool.logoNotes: Official Semantic Kernel logo asset from the owner-controlled microsoft/semantic-kernel repo (`docs/images/sk_logo.png`).
tool.practitionerNote: Natural fit for Microsoft-leaning engineering teams that want code-first orchestration with .NET and enterprise integration paths.

dataResidency.detail: Self-hosted SDK; data residency is operator-determined.

deployment.detail: Library/SDK via package manager; no managed hosting.

auditLogging.detail: OpenTelemetry integration documented but operator-configured; no built-in audit log.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; SOC 2 applies to the operator's infrastructure, not the package.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 27001 applies to the operator's ISMS, not the package.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 42001 applies to the deploying organisation.

euAiAct.detail: Developer component, not an AI system placed on the market; obligations rest with the deployer.
